'''vathoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dying|dying]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-th-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dying|dying]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| vathoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vætheketh|vætheketh]] || [[word:væthekej|væthekej]] || [[word:væthekesh|væthekesh]] || [[word:vætheke|vætheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vathothokoth|vathothokoth]] || [[word:vathothokoj|vathothokoj]] || [[word:vathothokosh|vathothokosh]] || [[word:vathothoko|vathothoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vathokoth|vathokoth]] || [[word:vathokoj|vathokoj]] || [[word:vathokosh|vathokosh]] || [[word:vathoko|vathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vathofkofth|vathofkofth]] || [[word:vathofkofj|vathofkofj]] || [[word:vathofkofsh|vathofkofsh]] || [[word:vathofkof|vathofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vathokotho|vathokotho]] || [[word:vathokojo|vathokojo]] || [[word:vathokosho|vathokosho]] || [[word:vathokoko|vathokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vathokoth|vathokoth]] || [[word:vathokoj|vathokoj]] || [[word:vathokosh|vathokosh]] || [[word:vathoko|vathoko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vathokothol|vathokothol]] || [[word:vathokojol|vathokojol]] || [[word:vathokoshol|vathokoshol]] || [[word:vathokokol|vathokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vathokoothotho|vathokoothotho]] || [[word:vathokoojojo|vathokoojojo]] || [[word:vathokooshosho|vathokooshosho]] || [[word:vathokooko|vathokooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vathokothon|vathokothon]] || [[word:vathokojon|vathokojon]] || [[word:vathokoshon|vathokoshon]] || [[word:vathokokon|vathokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vathokothooro|vathokothooro]] || [[word:vathokojooro|vathokojooro]] || [[word:vathokoshooro|vathokoshooro]] || [[word:vathokokooro|vathokokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|effa290}}
